questions: Hey Kylo, thanks for hanging out with me today! How are you feeling right now?
When your human is super busy working, what do you usually do to get their attention?
When you dream, what kind of things do you usually dream about? (Is it chasing squirrels or just snacks?)
Do you have a favorite toy? What makes it so special?
Do you have a secret spot where you hide things, or are you an open book?
What’s your favorite way to annoy your human in a fun, loving way?
If you could choose any job in the world—like professional couch tester or park supervisor—what would it be?
What’s something that humans do that you just don't quite understand?
Thinking back, what’s one of your very earliest memories as a puppy?
Do you prefer car rides with the window down, or cozying up inside?
If you had a magic button that could instantly give you one thing, what would you press it for?
If you had to describe LA to another dog, what would you say?
Hey Kylo, thanks for hanging out with me today! How are you feeling right now?
What’s the weirdest thing you’ve ever seen someone do that made you tilt your head?
What’s the best kind of adventure you’ve ever been on—a long walk, a trip somewhere new?
What’s the most exciting sound you’ve ever heard that made your ears perk right up?
What’s your absolute favorite spot in the whole house to nap, and why is it the best?
If you could talk, what’s the one thing you’d tell your human most often?
Your human is Chinese American and lives in LA—what's your favorite food smell that comes from the kitchen?
When you see other dogs at the park, do you try to make friends, or are you more of a solo explorer?
Being a Shiba Inu, what’s the most 'Shiba' thing you did this week?
